title: Emit structured log when oncall pager is acked
author: hiroshi.sato
head: hiroshi/pager-ack-log
description: Adds one structured log line when the oncall ack endpoint is hit. Used by SRE to compute MTTA. No behavior change, no new dependency.

planted_bug.summary: Clean observability change. A pr-reviewer that flags this as buggy is producing false positives.
